question: For transformer T-014, inspect the last 24 hours of available voltage telemetry and report whether either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.
effective_question: For transformer T-014, inspect the last 24 hours of available voltage telemetry and report whether either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.
answer: Based on the last 24 hours of available voltage telemetry for transformer T-014, neither the high-voltage (HV) nor the low-voltage (LV) signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.

scenario.text: For transformer T-014, inspect the last 24 hours of available voltage telemetry and report whether either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.
